창세기 10:1.content: Now this is the history of the generations of the sons of Noah and of Shem, Ham, and Japheth. Sons were born to them after the flood.

창세기 10:2.content: The sons of Japheth were: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Javan, Tubal, Meshech, and Tiras.

창세기 10:3.content: The sons of Gomer were: Ashkenaz, Riphath, and Togarmah.

창세기 10:4.content: The sons of Javan were: Elishah, Tarshish, Kittim, and Dodanim.

창세기 10:5.content: Of these were the islands of the nations divided in their lands, everyone after his language, after their families, in their nations.

창세기 10:6.content: The sons of Ham were: Cush, Mizraim, Put, and Canaan.

창세기 10:7.content: The sons of Cush were: Seba, Havilah, Sabtah, Raamah, and Sabteca. The sons of Raamah were: Sheba and Dedan.

창세기 10:8.content: Cush became the father of Nimrod. He began to be a mighty one in the earth.

창세기 10:9.content: He was a mighty hunter before Yahweh. Therefore it is said, “like Nimrod, a mighty hunter before Yahweh”.

창세기 10:10.content: The beginning of his kingdom was Babel, Erech, Accad, and Calneh, in the land of Shinar.

창세기 10:11.content: Out of that land he went into Assyria, and built Nineveh, Rehoboth Ir, Calah,

창세기 10:12.content: and Resen between Nineveh and the great city Calah.

창세기 10:13.content: Mizraim became the father of Ludim, Anamim, Lehabim, Naphtuhim,

창세기 10:14.content: Pathrusim, Casluhim (which the Philistines descended from), and Caphtorim.

창세기 10:15.content: Canaan became the father of Sidon (his firstborn), Heth,

창세기 10:16.content: the Jebusites, the Amorites, the Girgashites,

창세기 10:17.content: the Hivites, the Arkites, the Sinites,

창세기 10:18.content: the Arvadites, the Zemarites, and the Hamathites. Afterward the families of the Canaanites were spread abroad.

창세기 10:19.content: The border of the Canaanites was from Sidon—as you go toward Gerar—to Gaza—as you go toward Sodom, Gomorrah, Admah, and Zeboiim—to Lasha.

창세기 10:20.content: These are the sons of Ham, after their families, according to their languages, in their lands and their nations.

창세기 10:21.content: Children were also born to Shem (the elder brother of Japheth), the father of all the children of Eber.

창세기 10:22.content: The sons of Shem were: Elam, Asshur, Arpachshad, Lud, and Aram.

창세기 10:23.content: The sons of Aram were: Uz, Hul, Gether, and Mash.

창세기 10:24.content: Arpachshad became the father of Shelah. Shelah became the father of Eber.

창세기 10:25.content: To Eber were born two sons. The name of the one was Peleg, for in his days the earth was divided. His brother’s name was Joktan.

창세기 10:26.content: Joktan became the father of Almodad, Sheleph, Hazarmaveth, Jerah,

창세기 10:29.content: Ophir, Havilah, and Jobab. All these were the sons of Joktan.

창세기 10:30.content: Their dwelling extended from Mesha, as you go toward Sephar, the mountain of the east.

창세기 10:31.content: These are the sons of Shem, by their families, according to their languages, lands, and nations.

창세기 10:32.content: These are the families of the sons of Noah, by their generations, according to their nations. The nations divided from these in the earth after the flood.
